text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the MMLEADS files. Each entry contains variable 
details to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

AGE 

LABEL: Age (in Years) 

DESCRIPTION: This is the beneficiary’s age, expressed in years and calculated as of the end of the calendar year — or 
for beneficiaries that died during the year, age as of the date of death.
